# Refinea - Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Infrastructure

> Refinea is the GEO infrastructure platform that measures and optimizes how AI engines recommend brands. It tracks brand visibility inside ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews by buyer persona, purchase intent, and geographic context.

## About Refinea

Refinea is a SaaS platform purpose-built for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). It is the only platform that tracks, analyzes, and optimizes brand visibility inside AI-generated responses from large language models (LLMs).

Refinea operates at the decision layer — where AI models synthesize information and select which brands to recommend. In the era where customers ask AI for recommendations, discovery happens inside generated answers, not in lists of links.

## What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of increasing the probability that a brand is selected and recommended inside AI-generated responses. GEO optimizes for inclusion inside synthesized answers where AI models interpret sources, compare options, and generate recommendations.

GEO marks an evolution in how marketing reaches customers. Where traditional channels surface lists of links, AI models pre-select and recommend options on behalf of users. This shifts marketing from keyword competition to decision-layer influence.

## Core Capabilities

- **AI Visibility Tracking**: Measures how ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews recommend a brand across different buyer personas and purchase intents.
- **Dynamic Buyer Persona Modeling**: Maps how AI responses change based on who is asking — industry, experience level, geography, and goals.
- **Intent-Mapped GEO Queries**: Runs persona-matched prompts across LLM engines to measure brand visibility with query fan-out.
- **AI-Optimized Content Publishing**: Generates and publishes content optimized to be synthesized by AI engines, directly to WordPress Headless via REST API.
- **Cross-Persona Visibility Analysis**: Identifies where a brand is recommended for one persona type but excluded for another.
- **Agentic Workflows**: Automated workflows that act on AI visibility data (audits, content briefs, competitive scans).
- **API + MCP Access**: Full programmatic access and Model Context Protocol integration for the entire Refinea platform.

## Pricing

All prices are net of applicable VAT (22% for Italian customers, B2B only).

- **Lite Plan**: €129/month +VAT — 40 monitored prompts, monitoring every 2 days, 2 AI-optimized articles/month, 20 workflow credits, ChatGPT + Gemini + Perplexity coverage, email support, unlimited team members.
- **Pro Plan**: €299/month +VAT (14 days free trial) — 110 monitored prompts, monitoring every 2 days, 6 AI-optimized articles/month, 100 workflow credits, full LLM engine coverage including Claude and Google AI Overviews, API + MCP access, dedicated Slack support, unlimited team members.
- **Agencies**: Custom pricing — unlimited prompts, custom monitoring frequency, all AI models, full API + MCP, unified client management, dedicated support.

Yearly billing available with 3 months free (pay for 9 months instead of 12).

## Key Concepts

### AI Visibility
AI visibility refers to how frequently and positively a brand is mentioned, recommended, or selected by AI engines when users ask questions relevant to that brand's category. As AI agents increasingly mediate purchasing decisions, brands that are invisible to AI systems lose revenue opportunities.

### Persona-Based Optimization
AI-generated responses adapt based on who is asking. Large language models infer user characteristics and adjust recommendations accordingly. A brand might be recommended for one type of user but excluded for another. The unit of optimization in the AI-native era is the persona, not the keyword.

### Decision-Layer Influence
In the generative era, marketing shifts from competing for rankings to competing for selection. Refinea provides the infrastructure to influence how AI agents select and recommend brands at scale.
